title: Bitget launches RWA platform Reality in tokenization push
message_html: Bitget launches RWA platform Reality in tokenization push ...
snippet: Bitget said Reality will initially offer tokenized exposure to selected U.S. stocks and ETFs through its broader trading ecosystem.

title: Liquid launches Co-Invest app, bringing AI-powered live trade execution into ChatGPT and Claude
message_html: Liquid launches Co-Invest app, bringing AI-powered live trade execution into ChatGPT and Claude ...
snippet: Co-Invest supports crypto, equities, FX, Polymarket positions and pre-IPO secondaries across over 500 markets, according to Liquid.
